message:
feat(bundle): implement bundle signing with Ed25519

Implement the --sign and --sign-key CLI flags for bundle create:
- Add Ed25519Signer that parses OpenSSH private key format
- Sign bundle checksums and embed signature in manifest
- Default to ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 if --sign without explicit key
- Add 5 tests for signer functionality

Also includes bundle update feature (meta_skill-wlh) and related
improvements to install flow.

Closes: meta_skill-7g3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -89,6 +89,7 @@ walkdir = "2.5"

 hex = "0.4"
+base64 = "0.22"
 once_cell = "1.19"
 itertools = "0.13"
 textwrap = "0.16"
@@ -109,7 +110,7 @@ vergen-gix = { version = "1.0", features = ["build", "cargo", "rustc"] }
 tempfile = "3.14"
 assert_cmd = "2.0"
 predicates = "3.1"
-insta = "1"
+insta = { version = "1", features = ["json", "yaml"] }
 criterion = { version = "0.5", features = ["html_reports"] }
 proptest = "1.4"
 proptest-derive = "0.4"
